name: Ikan Bali (Bali Fish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the fish into serving portions and rub salt all over.
2. Fry in batches until golden brown, then drain on absorbent paper.
3. Heat oil in a pan and sauté sliced onions until lightly browned.
4. Add sambal oelek, laos, lemon grass, tamarind juice, ginger, brown sugar, and soy sauce to the pan. Stir-fry thoroughly.
5. Place the fried fish in a serving dish and pour the sauce over it. Serve with rice.
